title: Rearchitect CMG Edu Branding and Matching to single-request gpt-5.4-nano ScoreVersion
description:
Create a new non-champion ScoreVersion for CMG Edu Branding and Matching based on the current champion.

Scope:
- Pull current champion configuration
- Rework logic to perform the full YES/NO classification in one LLM request (single decision pass)
- Set model to `gpt-5.4-nano`
- Push as a new ScoreVersion

Definition of Done:
- New ScoreVersion created successfully from champion baseline
- Configuration uses exactly one LLM classification request path
- Model is `gpt-5.4-nano`
- Kanbus log contains command trail and resulting ScoreVersion ID

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
Work started.

Plan:
1) Identify CMG Edu Branding and Matching score + current champion version.
2) Pull champion YAML locally.
3) Re-architect prompt/structure to a single LLM classification request path.
4) Set model to gpt-5.4-nano.
5) Push as new non-champion ScoreVersion and record version ID.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
Discovery update:
- Resolved scorecard via ID 1039 -> CMG - EDU v1.0.
- Resolved target score: Branding and Matching (ID 45425).
- Pulled champion YAML and guidelines.
- Champion version: db3df9e6-2f78-4f0a-9876-48bd16515cdd.
- Local file: scorecards/CMG - EDU v1.0/Branding and Matching.yaml.

Next: rewrite tactus_code to a single-agent-call architecture and set model_name to gpt-5.4-nano, then push new ScoreVersion.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
Implementation complete:
- Replaced champion tactus_code architecture for score 45425 (Branding and Matching) with a single LLM request path.
- New logic builds one consolidated schools block and issues exactly one Agent call for the whole transcript/metadata.
- Updated model to gpt-5.4-nano at both score-level model_name and Agent model.

Push result:
- Command: python -m plexus.cli score push --scorecard 1039 --score "Branding and Matching" --note "Single-request rearchitecture with gpt-5.4-nano"
- Previous champion: db3df9e6-2f78-4f0a-9876-48bd16515cdd
- New ScoreVersion: c918b11b-8fca-4dbd-b7b4-d130e5f98e94
- Push output confirmed: "Changes detected: code. Creating new version." and successful creation.
